response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, fluent assertions), and leadership in open-source and team training — all highly relevant. However, he lacks explicit evidence of people management experience beyond workshops and open-source collaboration, and there's no clear demonstration of managing a team or leading organizational change, which are required for this managerial role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and training workshops
Deep cross-platform expertise including mobile (iOS/Apple TV) and build/testing infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Lacks documented experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
Mobile platform experience is limited to iOS app maintenance, not ecosystem-wide tooling
